member.summary: Methods querying edited rows in an SOI before applyEdits.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesGDB.IBranchEditingSOI.UseLastEditMomentForNextQuery
member.summary: Set the next query to use the edit moment of the branch.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesGDB.IDatabaseLockInfo.DatasetType
member.summary: The type of the locked dataset, if it is a dataset.

member.summary: Is the lock from the current connection.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesGDB.IDatabaseLockInfo.LockOwner
member.summary: The user that owns the lock.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesGDB.IDatabaseLockInfo.LockTime
member.summary: The time when the lock was acquired.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesGDB.IDatabaseLockInfo.ObjectID
member.summary: The ID of the locked object.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesGDB.IDatabaseLockInfo.ObjectName
member.summary: The name of the locked object.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesGDB.IDatabaseLockInfo.SessionID
member.summary: The session that owns the lock.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesGDB.IDatabaseLocksInfo
member.summary: Methods for getting information about locks in a database.

member.summary: All the locks in the database.

member.summary: An enumeration of locks in a database.
